name: CompatibilityScoringConvergence

neutralConcepts: B1 reads from xiigen-matching-profiles (GLOBAL) ONLY — never xiigen-business-profiles
Weight sum validation: 4 weights must sum to 1.0 — CONFIG_ERROR if not
B2 tier thresholds (STRONG/MEDIUM/WEAK) from FREEDOM config — never hardcoded
partialResults flag forwarded through entire chain B1→B2→T52

ironRules.rule: B1 30s timeout → partialResults:true MUST be placed in quality.successModes — NOT failureModes. Timeout produces output = success. DataProcessResult.failure is reserved for infrastructure errors only.
B1 reads from xiigen-matching-profiles (GLOBAL scope) ONLY. Reading from xiigen-business-profiles = PRIVATE data leak. NEVER searchDocuments('xiigen-business-profiles', ...).
Weight sum validation: industry + stage + location + team MUST equal 1.0. Return DataProcessResult.failure('CONFIG_ERROR', ...) if abs(sum - 1.0) > 0.001.
B2 tier thresholds (STRONG >= 0.7, MEDIUM >= 0.4, WEAK < 0.4) come from FREEDOM config keys flow02_tier_threshold_strong/medium. Never hardcoded numeric values.
partialResults flag from B1 must be forwarded to B2 output and ultimately to T52 input. Never swallowed or reset to false by intermediate nodes.
DNA-8: store scoring result (xiigen-business-matches) BEFORE BusinessMatchesFound enqueue. B2 suggestion result BEFORE ConnectionSuggestionsReady enqueue.

keywords: compatibility scoring convergence timeout success mode global index weight sum partial results connection suggestions
